name: squish-helper
description: Autocomplete for Squish global script symbols in Python test files

commands.title: Squish Helper: Rescan Global Script Directories

squishHelper.batFilePath.description: Absolute path to the Squish bat file that sets SQUISH_USER_SETTINGS_DIR and related env vars.

squishHelper.globalScriptBasePath.description: Base path used to resolve relative global script paths (e.g. '/Squish Global Scripts/foo' becomes '<basePath>/Squish Global Scripts/foo').

squishHelper.globalScriptDirs.description: Manual list of absolute paths to global script directories. Used when batFilePath is not set.

squishHelper.squishPrefix.description: Path to the Squish installation directory (e.g. C:\Squish_Windows_9.1.0).

squishHelper.squishProjectDir.description: Path to the directory containing .project and .pydevproject (the Squish Global Scripts Eclipse project). Used to resolve global script source paths automatically.
